content: Self-Refine's single-prompt iterative refinement framework can be grounded by multiple-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hierarchical self-improvement pipeline: the multi-perspective reflection step first generates inconsistent critical viewpoints on the LLM's initial output, which are then fed into Self-Refine's iterative self-feedback loop to refine output without any supervised data or external training. This hybrid approach resolves Self-Refine's key limitation of blind, single-perspective iteration while retaining its core advantage of zero extra training data.
